meta.mission: Welcome to the PFC Master List, ang official directory ng carefully curated, secured, at trusted fragrance shops recommended by the Pinoy Fragheads Community (PFC). Lahat ng shops dito ay dumaan sa evaluation: based sa personal experience, verified distributors or legitimate sourcing, at strong vouching from the community over time. Kahit curated na ’to, we still encourage everyone to practice due diligence bago bumili. Let’s stay smart and responsible consumers. Before you explore, don’t forget to follow PFC’s social media pages for updates and to support the community. Let’s continue supporting legit shops, local brands, at syempre, gawin nating mabango ang Pilipinas, one Filipino at a time. 💯✌️
meta.preferredIntro:
Shops under this category have submitted business documents, actively participate in the fragrance community, and are well-vouched by members. These are trusted shops with which PFC admins have had personal transactions and positive client experiences. All PFC-Preferred Shops listed are issued a Certificate as proof of inclusion.
While these submissions reflect a higher level of transparency and commitment from the shops, PFC’s listing is based on the documents and information provided and does not constitute a guarantee, warranty, or assumption of liability for any transactions. This process highlights the goodwill and proactive effort of participating shops to meet community standards, transparency, and accountability.
meta.communityIntro: These shops are well-known within the community and their links have been verified to belong to the stated stores. However, PFC has not conducted internal review, transaction validation, or authenticity checks, and therefore cannot guarantee the authenticity or quality of their products. As such, these shops are not officially certified, endorsed, or classified as PFC-Preferred, and PFC assumes no liability for any transactions made with them. Buyers are strongly advised to exercise due diligence when transacting.
